# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

# This configuration enables the Envoy admin interface on all sidecars.
# It sets the admin port to 15000 and allows access for debugging purposes.
# The admin interface provides endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters
# which are useful for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
spec:
  meshConfig:
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      proxyAdminEnabled: true
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
        enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        excludeInboundPorts:
          - 15000
        excludeOutboundPorts:
          - 15000
      logging:
        level: debug
      tracer:
        zipkin:
          address: zipkin.istio-system:9411
    gateways:
      istio-ingressgateway:
        runAsRoot: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      templates:
        debug: |
          spec:
            containers:
              - name: istio-proxy
                env:
                  - name: ISTIO_PROXY_ADMIN_PORT
                    value: "15000"
                ports:
                  - containerPort: 15000
                    name: http-admin
                    protocol: TCP
                readinessProbe:
                  httpGet:
                    path: /ready
                    port: 15000
                  initialDelaySeconds: 1
                  periodSeconds: 2
                  failureThreshold: 30
                livenessProbe:
                  httpGet:
                    path: /healthz
                    port: 15000
                  initialDelaySeconds: 1
                  periodSeconds: 2
                  failureThreshold: 30
---
# Example of a Pod with the debug template injected to expose the admin port.
# This part is just an example and not part of the IstioOperator configuration.
# To use this, you would annotate your application pods with:
# "sidecar.istio.io/inject: \"true\""
# "sidecar.istio.io/userVolume: '[\"{{ .Values.sidecarInjectorWebhook.templates.debug }}\"]'"
# Or configure the sidecar injector to always apply the debug template.
# This example is illustrative of how the IstioOperator config above affects sidecars.
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: example-app
  labels:
    app: example-app
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  containers:
    - name: app
      image: busybox
      command: ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Hello Istio!' && sleep 3600"]
      ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http-app
          protocol: TCP
# This is a conceptual representation of the injected Envoy proxy container
# after applying the IstioOperator. The actual injection is handled by Istio.
# The `ports` and `env` entries for `istio-proxy` would be added by the sidecar injector.
#      - name: istio-proxy
#        image: auto
#        env:
#          - name: ISTIO_PROXY_ADMIN_PORT
#            value: "15000"
#        ports:
#          - containerPort: 15000
#            name: http-admin
#            protocol: TCP
#        readinessProbe:
#          httpGet:
#            path: /ready
#            port: 15000
#          initialDelaySeconds: 1
#          periodSeconds: 2
#          failureThreshold: 30
#        livenessProbe:
#          httpGet:
#            path: /healthz
#            port: 15000
#          initialDelaySeconds: 1
#          periodSeconds: 2
#          failureThreshold: 30
